series_metadata.series_description: This form is used by individual income tax filers for filing and paying their State income tax. This form is filed annually and is due on April 15 for calendar year taxpayers or on the 15th day of the fourth month following the end of a fiscal year.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: Be maintained a period of from due date ; Electronic: Electronic record is kept 10 years via ODT Info Image System
